meaning: 赫雷斯[西班牙西南部城市](以酿制雪利酒及培育混血良种马著称)
examples: His family is in Jerez de los Caballeros near Badajoz.
Schumacher's illegal manoeuvre at Jerez cost him dear - he was formally stripped of his standings for 1997.
After testing in Jerez I had a couple of days to enjoy the beautiful Finnish summer in the sea with the boat.
The 17-round MotoGP World Championship starts with the Spanish Grand Prix at Jerez on March 26.
Brawn returns to work with Ferrari on 5 January for a week's testing in Jerez.
